seo.title: Lash & Brow Studio Review Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your lash or brow studio. Route unhappy clients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Eyebrow and Lash Studios

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Eyebrow and Lash Studios
hero.subheading: Clients love the mirror moment but rarely open Google afterward. ReviewFlo sends a quick ask after the appointment.

socialProof.text: Built for lash and brow studios

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Lash Studio Faces

items.heading: Great fills do not automatically become five stars
items.body: Clients snap selfies for themselves, not for your Business Profile.

items.heading: One allergic reaction review names your tech
items.body: Sensitive skin issues turn emotional fast in public comments.

items.heading: Back-to-back bookings leave no time to coach reviews
items.body: The room resets and the next client is already waiting.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Brow and Lash Studios

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask right after the reveal
items.body: Send when they are still excited at checkout.

items.heading: Private path for irritation or timing issues
items.body: Upset clients message you before venting online.

items.heading: Simple for solo artists and small teams
$270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when you ask soon after the visit and keep it about their experience.
If someone reacts, private feedback gives you space to document and respond.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing for happy versus unhappy clients at indie-studio pricing.
Start with one studio link and add structure as you grow.

items.a: Yes. Share the same link from any phone.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Lash Studio Reviews Today
